[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 00001001 2
1 10000001 2
2 00000110 2
3 00111011 5
4 11000101 4
5 01100001 3
6 10110010 4
7 01111110 6
